steps.title: Restrict to sugar maples
steps.content: The condition says the tree is a sugar maple, so use only the sugar maple row of the table.

steps.title: Use the row counts
steps.content: There are $42$ sugar maples from Site A and $60$ sugar maples total. The conditional probability is $$\frac{42}{60}=\frac{7}{10}=0.7$$
